name: Data Exfiltration Detection
description: Detects potential data exfiltration: outbound traffic exceeding 1 GB in 5 minutes to unknown external destinations

baseline.description: Alert when current traffic exceeds 3x 30-day average

false_positive_guidance: Scheduled backup jobs transferring large datasets
Database replication to known secondary sites
Video streaming or large file downloads by users
remediation_steps: 1. IMMEDIATELY identify destination IP and lookup threat intel
2. Block outbound connection to destination if suspicious
3. Identify source process responsible for traffic
4. Isolate the host from network if compromise confirmed
5. Preserve memory image and disk for forensics
6. Notify legal/compliance team if PII data may be involved
